title: Sneaky Vidgen
description: Wan2.2 Image-to-Video serverless worker with GGUF quantization, multi-LoRA, caching, and SageAttention.

config.gpuIds: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090,NVIDIA A100-PCIE-40GB,NVIDIA A100 80GB PCIe,NVIDIA L40,NVIDIA L40S,NVIDIA RTX A5000,NVIDIA RTX A6000,NVIDIA H100 PCIe,NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3

input.name: Quantization Method
input.description: gguf = GGUF quantised transformers (baked in image). bnb4/bnb8/none = BitsAndBytes or full precision (requires network volume with full model).

options.label: No quantization / BF16 (network vol, ~66 GB VRAM)

input.name: Cache Threshold
input.description: FirstBlockCache threshold (TeaCache-style). Higher = faster but lower quality. 0 = disabled. Try 0.05-0.1 for speed.

input.name: Default Flow Shift
input.description: Flow shift for scheduler. 3.0 for 480P, 5.0 for 720P.

input.name: HuggingFace Token
input.description: HuggingFace access token (optional, for runtime model download)

input.name: CivitAI Token
input.description: CivitAI API token for restricted LoRA downloads (optional)
